medications.name: Acetaminophen
medications.instructions: Take 2 tablets by mouth every 8 hours as needed
medications.notes: Do not exceed 3,000 mg per day.

medications.name: Oxycodone
medications.instructions: Take 1 tablet by mouth every 6 hours as needed for severe pain
medications.notes: Do not drive or drink alcohol.

medications.name: Docusate sodium
medications.instructions: Take 1 capsule by mouth twice daily as needed
medications.notes: For constipation while taking opioid pain medicine.

follow_up: Surgery clinic follow-up in 10 to 14 days for wound check.
Call surgery clinic if pathology results are not received within 7 days.
return_precautions: Return for fever above 101 F, worsening abdominal pain, repeated vomiting, pus or spreading redness around incision, chest pain, shortness of breath, or inability to pass urine.
risk_notes: Moderate risk: post-op wound monitoring and short opioid course.
